title: mildella henryi
intro: Mildella henryi, also known as Chinese angelica, is a perennial plant native to China and Japan, belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anticoagulant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mildella henryi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving circulation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for its herbal preparations, which are often used to treat conditions such as colds, flu, and digestive issues.
